message:
Upgrade npm before OIDC publish

OIDC trusted publishing requires npm >= 11.5.1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -138,6 +138,8 @@ jobs:
           ls -la prebuilds/
           echo "WASM:"
           ls -la tree-sitter-tql.wasm
+      - name: Upgrade npm for OIDC support
+        run: npm install -g npm@latest && npm --version
       - name: Publish to npm with provenance
         run: npm publish --access public --provenance
   pypi:

@@ -2,7 +2,10 @@
   "name": "tree-sitter-tql",
   "version": "1.0.0",
   "description": "Tree-sitter grammar for the Tenzir Query Language (TQL)",
-  "repository": "https://github.com/tenzir/tree-sitter-tql",
+  "repository": {
+    "type": "git",
+    "url": "git+https://github.com/tenzir/tree-sitter-tql.git"
+  },
   "license": "MIT",
   "author": {
     "name": "Tenzir",
